description: The only REST-native Google Ad Manager CLI: report, search, and manage publisher inventory from the terminal, backed by a local mirror the web console can't match.

novel_features.name: One-Shot Async Report
novel_features.description: Create, run, poll, and fetch every row of a GAM report in a single blocking command instead of the four-step UI slog.

novel_features.name: Saved Report Rerun
novel_features.description: Re-execute an existing saved report definition by ID and stream fresh rows, so the morning revenue pull is one short command.

novel_features.name: Daily Report Diff
novel_features.description: Re-run a saved report and diff it against the last cached run to surface what moved in revenue, impressions, or eCPM since yesterday.

novel_features.name: Order Expansion Graph
novel_features.description: Expand one order into its line items (goal, type, flight dates) in one structured object.

novel_features.name: Ad-Unit Tree View
novel_features.description: Render the full hierarchical ad-unit tree (or any subtree) from cache, with status and depth, in one offline call.

novel_features.name: Inventory Orphan Audit
novel_features.description: Tree-walk the ad-unit hierarchy to flag active units with no placement coverage.

novel_features.name: Local Resync Diff
novel_features.description: Show which mirrored entities were added or changed (by updateTime) since a cutoff — a changelog the platform does not keep.

novel_features.name: Line-Item Pacing Join
novel_features.description: Join read-only line-item goals against a delivery report to show each line item's pace versus goal, ranked by risk.
